input: user-item interaction graph and knowledge graph (first-order and second-order proximity)
output: ranked item recommendations with individual fairness
backbone: SKIPHop (GNN that aggregates first-order and second-order neighbor representations)
key_idea: incorporate second-order proximity from knowledge graphs into GNN message passing and add fairness regularization to enforce similar treatment of similar users
datasets: two real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
